title: calliandra comosa
intro: Calliandra comosa, also known as Powder Puff or Pink Powder Puff, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its delicate pink or white powder puff-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Calliandra comosa include relief from fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies such as capsules and extracts.
